title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. The model supports a 256-token canvas and includes self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through diffusion rather than the standard autoregressive approach. The shift matters because diffusion lets the model produce text up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. Concrete details include a 256-token canvas and built-in self-correction capabilities.
